challenges.title: Your Website Should Do More Than
challenges.description: Many businesses in Texas rely on websites that look modern but struggle to generate inquiries, communicate value, or perform well in search.
challenges.secondaryDescription: At Fillip Technologies, we build fast, discoverable, scalable websites designed around measurable business outcomes.
challenges.cta: See How We Solve These Challenges

items.title: Slow Performance
items.description: Slow pages create poor first impressions and cause potential customers to leave before they explore your services.

items.title: Poor User Experience
items.description: Unclear navigation and confusing layouts make it harder for visitors to understand your business and take action.

items.title: Low Conversion Rates
items.description: Traffic has limited value when pages do not guide visitors toward calls, inquiries, bookings, or purchases.

items.title: Limited Scalability
items.description: Outdated platforms become difficult to manage as your content, services, integrations, and customer base grow.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about website design and development services for businesses in Texas.

items.question: How much does website design cost in Texas?
items.answer: The cost depends on the number of pages, required features, integrations, content needs, and overall project complexity. We provide a tailored estimate after understanding your requirements.

items.question: How long does it take to build a business website?
items.answer: A typical business website can take several weeks from discovery to launch. Larger ecommerce or custom application projects may require a longer delivery timeline.

items.question: Will my website be mobile-friendly and SEO-ready?
items.answer: Yes. We build responsive websites with performance, accessibility, technical SEO foundations, and clear content structure considered throughout development.

items.question: Can you redesign an existing website?
items.answer: Yes. We can review your current website, retain what is working, and improve its design, structure, performance, usability, and conversion paths.
